chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ آذَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ احْتَقَرَهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 145 – The one who hurts the Muslims and despises them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/380)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/380)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يَقُولُ مَنْ أَهَانَ لِي وَلِيّاً فَقَدْ أَرْصَدَ لِمُحَارَبَتِي وَ أَنَا أَسْرَعُ شَيْ‏ءٍ إِلَى نُصْرَةِ أَوْلِيَائِي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhamad, from Ali Bin Al Nu’man, from Ibn Muskan, from Moalla Bin Khunays who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High is Saying: “The one who despises (hates) a friend of Mine<sup>azwj</sup>, so he has declared a war against Me<sup>azwj</sup> and I<sup>azwj</sup> am the Quickest to Helping My<sup>azwj</sup> friends”’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from ibn Muskan from Mu’alla ibn Khunayth who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, says, ‘Whoever insults any of My friends has waged a war against Me. I am the quickest to support My friends.’”
